debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
Y : Set α
inst✝ : G.Finite
⊢ 2 * @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G ≤ G.vertexSet.encard + Y.encard - encard (@Graph.OddComponents α β (G - Y))

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : 2 * ν(K) ≤ V(K).encard - K.OddComponents.encard := sorry
  have h₂ : ν(G) ≤ ν(K) + (V(G) ∩ Y).encard := sorry

    _ ≤ 2 * ν(K) + 2 * (V(G) ∩ Y).encard := by rw [mul_add]; gcongr
    _ ≤ (V(K).encard - K.OddComponents.encard) + 2 * (V(G) ∩ Y).encard := add_le_add_right h₁ _
    _ ≤ V(G).encard + Y.encard - K.OddComponents.encard := by sorry
